themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents designed to autonomously perform research tasks, from data analysis to content generation and execution of workflows.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content focusing on AI tools that assist developers in writing, reviewing, and debugging code.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles about platforms, software, and frameworks designed to facilitate and enhance various aspects of research processes using AI.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Publications detailing AI applications for condensing large amounts of text, audio, or video into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Research and discussions on how AI is affecting job roles, recruitment, and the skills required in the workforce.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Content related to using AI to automate, enhance, or conduct usability testing for products and services.

themes.name: AI qualitative research
themes.description: Articles discussing the application of AI in qualitative research methods, such as interviews and sentiment analysis.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Focuses on AI tools and methods for analyzing user sentiment and feedback from various sources.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Articles specifically examining the development, capabilities, risks, and applications of AI chatbots in research and user interaction.

themes.name: AI product research
themes.description: Content related to using AI for market research, product development insights, and understanding product lifecycles.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
